title: Hohoe Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Hohoe with a Z-Score of +3.03. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Hohoe has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The heat index is further exacerbated by high humidity at 73% and low wind speed of 2.6 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 9.6 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately
